items.title: Fleet & Corporate Charging Management Initiative
items.description: Fleet & Corporate Charging Management Initiative is the quarter's focused investment to move Reduced Fleet TCO and Fleet Contract Value, anchored in session reliability, roaming clarity, and depot-readiness as charger density and utilization rise and led through Fleet Management. The quarter concentrates on charger reliability, roaming transparency, and fleet-depot readiness as networks scale so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase reduced fleet tco by strengthening fleet management and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Decrease charging cost control by improving fleet management and removing avoidable workflow friction.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase fleet contract value by strengthening fleet management and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Extended Fleet Management with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Contract & Customer Management with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Driver Authorization Service with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Tariff & Pricing Management with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced workflow updates in Web Portal.
Introduced workflow updates in Public APIs.
Introduced workflow updates in ERP Integrations.

items.title: Enterprise Charge Point Management Platform Initiative
items.description: Enterprise Charge Point Management Platform Initiative is the quarter's focused investment to move Profitable Charging Network and Annual Recurring Revenue from CPMS, anchored in session reliability, roaming clarity, and depot-readiness as charger density and utilization rise and led through Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway. The quarter concentrates on charger reliability, roaming transparency, and fleet-depot readiness as networks scale so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase profitable charging network by strengthening charge point connectivity & protocol gateway and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase network utilization by strengthening charge point connectivity & protocol gateway and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase annual recurring revenue from cpms by strengthening charge point connectivity & protocol gateway and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase account expansion by strengthening charge point connectivity & protocol gateway and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Extended Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Charge Point Management with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Session Orchestration with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced workflow updates in Web Portal.
Introduced workflow updates in Public APIs.
Introduced workflow updates in Partner Integrations.
